signals.raw:
GTA VI Release Before June 2026 Odds at 1% with $14M Volume | NO | MED confidence**  
Traders heavily bet against GTA VI launching before June 2026 (1% yes price), backed by $14M volume and $61K liquidity in this news stories market, indicating strong skepticism on timely release[4]. No fresh confirmations or announcements noted to shift this.
